scripts.template:build:nextjs: cd sandbox-templates && cd nextjs && e2b template build --name magic-web-ai --cmd '/compile_page.sh'
scripts.template:publish:nextjs: cd sandbox-templates && cd nextjs && e2b template publish -t 8bfae4ef-a1a9-4183-b2a5-4b59b8e19aec
scripts.template:build:react-native-expo: cd sandbox-templates && cd react-native-expo && e2b template build --name react-native-expo-mobile --cmd '/compile_page.sh'
scripts.template:publish:react-native-expo: cd sandbox-templates && cd react-native-expo && e2b template publish -t 8bfae4ef-a1a9-4183-b2a5-4b59b8e19aec
scripts.template:build:expo: cd sandbox-templates && cd expo && e2b template build --name expo-web-app --cmd '/compile_page.sh'

scripts.template:build:mobile: cp -r sandbox-templates/skills-memory sandbox-templates/mobile-template/.deepagents && cd sandbox-templates && cd mobile-template && e2b template build --name mobile-template; rm -rf sandbox-templates/mobile-template/.deepagents
scripts.template:publish:mobile: cd sandbox-templates && cd mobile-template && e2b template publish -t 5q5q9v9kflakcmilhqxe
